title: The process of ageing
scene: 十二岁时人体最为强健，死亡概率最低；此后活力与抵抗力逐渐丧失，终至无论自我保养、社会与医生如何照料都无法继续存活——这种随时间流逝的衰退称为衰老。令人不快的是，我们终将「老死」，且多数人会在六十五至八十岁之间辞世。人们常把衰老比作热水壶变凉或鞋子磨穿，但人体与机械不同：十二至八十岁之间我们逐渐失去自我修复能力，若保持十二岁时的活力，半数人需约七百年才会死去。本课语法侧重 however well 引导的让步状语从句，以及修饰 discoveries、process 的定语从句。

words.eg: This decline in vigour is called ageing. 这种活力的衰退称为衰老。
At twelve the body is at its most vigorous. 十二岁时人体最为强健。
Infants and young children are more vulnerable. 婴幼儿更为脆弱。
The loss of vigour is imperceptible at first. 活力丧失起初难以察觉。
However lucky and robust we are, there is a limit. 无论多么幸运强健，寿命都有极限。
Mechanical systems run out of energy in accordance with thermodynamics. 机械系统依热力学定律耗尽能量。
Metal wears away by friction. 金属因摩擦而磨损。
Animal ageing is not analogous to a run-down watch. 动物衰老与停摆的表不可类比。
Whether the universe wears out is a moot point. 宇宙是否会耗尽仍是未决之题。
Alcohol may be a medical disinfectant, but should not be relied upon to sterilize water.
Ethanol is more effective at a concentration of 50-70 percent;
below 20 per cent, its bactericidal action is negligible.

words.cn: 可以忽略的，微不足道的
words.eg: below 20 per cent, its bactericidal action is negligible.
Beware of methylated alcohol,
but those I have known and whom I respect, confess at once that they have little idea where they are going when they first set pen to paper.
they are in that condition of eager discomfort which passes for inspiration all admit radical changes of destination once the journey has begun;
one, to my certain knowledge, spent nine months on a novel about Kashmir,
Timing and interweaving require patience. 时序与交织需要耐心。
In the breaking and remaking, in the timing interweaving, beginning afresh,
the writer comes to discern things in his material which were not consciously in his mind when he began.
This organic process, often leading to moments of extraordinary self-discovery, is of an indescribable fascination.
A blurred image appears; he adds a brushstroke and another and it is gone
Sometimes the yeast within a writer outlives a book he has written.
and still cannot fathom the exact outline of the vision before them.
For the same reason, writers talk interminably about their own books,
Writers winkle out hidden meanings from their books. 作家从书中探出隐藏含义。

grammar.explain: however + 形容词/副词 + 主谓 表「无论多么……」：however well we look after ourselves, however well society and our doctors look after us。易错点：however 在此不等于 however「然而」；不可与 but 连用。
examples: We can live no longer, however well we look after ourselves, and however well society, and our doctors, look after us. （无论自我保养、社会与医生如何照料，我们终将无法继续存活。）
There is a virtual limit on how long we can hope to remain alive, however lucky and robust we are. （无论多么幸运强健，我们能期望存活的岁月都有实际极限。）

grammar.explain: 修饰 discoveries、rate、process 等：discoveries which we all make、the rate which differs little、a process which was assumed self-evident。易错点：先行词指物作主语用 which/that。
examples: It is one of the most unpleasant discoveries which we all make that we must decline in this way. （我们终将如此衰退，这是最令所有人不快的发觉之一。）
People assumed that the process of losing vigour with time was something self-evident. （人们曾以为随时间丧失活力是不言自明的。）

tips: ①however + adj/adv + 主谓 = 无论多么……；②discoveries which we make 中 which 在从句中作宾语；③ageing 英式拼写，美式常作 aging。

title: Water and the traveller
scene: 水源污染常因近源卫生差、污水排入、管网渗漏或工业农业废水所致；即便源头安全，自来水抵达龙头时未必仍安全，间歇性供水尤应视为可疑。短途旅行者应避免饮用未经处理的自来水，宜选热饮或知名品牌瓶装/罐装饮料；开瓶应在场、瓶口洁净干燥。煮沸是可靠消毒法；冰的安全性取决于制冰用水，未知来源的冷饮应婉拒。酒精不可依赖以灭菌，甲醇剧毒。若无其他安全水源，烫手难触的自来水放凉后通常可饮。本课语法侧重 should be regarded as 等情态被动，以及 is due to 表原因的被动结构。

words.eg: Contamination of water supplies is usually due to poor sanitation. 水源污染通常因卫生差所致。
Poor sanitation close to water sources causes contamination. 水源附近卫生差导致污染。
Intermittent tap-water supplies should be regarded as suspect. 间歇性自来水应视为可疑。
Untreated water from any source is suspect. 任何来源的未经处理水都可疑。
Carbonated drinks are acidic and slightly safer. 碳酸饮料呈酸性，略为安全。
Alcohol should not be relied upon as a disinfectant. 不应依赖酒精作消毒剂。
Methylated alcohol is very poisonous. 变性酒精剧毒。
Below 20%, its bactericidal action is negligible. 低于百分之二十，杀菌作用可忽略。
Sewage disposal into sources causes contamination. 污水排入水源造成污染。
He is also, incidentally, an unforgivable bore.
A young English writer made the pertinent observation a year or two back
and when he flirts with fame, he is taking time off from living with himself,
from the search for what his world contains at its inmost point.
He gives the bank specimens of his signature, and there is a very firm rule
Waves are the children of the struggle between ocean and atmosphere, the ongoing signatures of infinity.
Rays from the sun excite and energize the atmosphere of the earth, awakening it to flow, to movement, to rhythm, to life.
Rays from the sun excite and energize the atmosphere of the earth, awakening it to flow, to movement, to rhythm, to life.
Rays from the sun excite and energize the atmosphere of the earth, awakening it to flow, to movement, to rhythm, to life.
might well re-transmit them back to its home-planet,
and the sea transmits it on through waves--an ancient, exquisite powerful message.
These ocean waves are among the earth's most complicated natural phenomena.
The basic features include a crest (the highest point of the wave),
a trough (the lowest point), a height (the vertical distance from the trough to the crest),
a trough (the lowest point), a height (the vertical distance from the trough to the crest),
a wave length (the horizontal distance between two wave crests),

grammar.explain: 科普说明常用被动强调客观事实：is usually due to、should be regarded as、is not always safe、can be left to cool。易错点：due to 表原因；regard A as B 被动为 A should be regarded as B。
examples: Contamination of water supplies is usually due to poor sanitation close to water sources. （水源污染通常因近源卫生差所致。）
Intermittent tap-water supplies should be regarded as particularly suspect. （间歇性自来水供应应特别视为可疑。）

grammar.explain: should 表建议：should avoid drinking、should be regarded as、should not be relied upon、should never be added。易错点：should not be relied upon to do 不可省略 upon。
examples: Travellers on short trips should avoid drinking tap-water from uncertain sources. （短途旅行者应避免饮用来源不明的水。）
Alcohol may be a medical disinfectant, but should not be relied upon to sterilize water. （酒精或为医用消毒剂，但不可依赖以灭菌。）

tips: ①should be regarded as = 应被视为；②due to 表原因；③insure 投保，ensure 确保，勿混淆。

title: What every writer wants
scene: 作者所识的杰出作家几乎无人初落笔时便清楚方向；他们带着一两个角色，处于被称为灵感的 eager discomfort，且承认旅程开始后目的地常彻底改变——有人将克什米尔题材小说整体改设于苏格兰高地。无人按学校所教先写「骨架」。在反复打破与重组、交织时序、重新开篇的过程中，作者渐悟初未意识到的素材内涵——这种有机过程常引至惊人的自我发现。作家亦易 endlessly 谈论自己的书，挖 hidden meanings，但这往往令人生厌；为取悦读者而写可能是 undoing。才华倾注于初稿，艺术成就于后续修改；作家如其他艺术家，无 resting place，须以内心判断为准。本课语法侧重 breaking and remaking 等动名词结构，以及修饰 drafts、writer 的定语从句。

words.eg: The talent goes into the first draft. 才华倾注于初稿。
In the breaking and remaking, the writer discovers new things. 在打破与重组中，作者发现新内涵。
Timing and interweaving require patience. 时序与交织需要耐心。
They cannot fathom the exact outline of the vision. 他们无法领会愿景的确切轮廓。
A writer makes order out of the anarchy of his heart. 作家将内心的无序化为秩序。
A young writer made a pertinent observation. 一位年轻作家作了切题评论。
Writing to please can be his undoing. 为取悦而写可能是祸根。
He is, incidentally, an unforgivable bore. 顺便说，他也是令人难以容忍的 bore。
Writers winkle out hidden meanings from their books. 作家从书中探出隐藏含义。
in actuality waves move through the water leaving the water about where it was.
the ocean and everything on it would be racing in to the shore with obviously catastrophic results.
An ocean wave passing through deep water causes a particle on the surface to move in a roughly circular orbit,
From both maturity to death, a wave is subject to the same laws as any other 'living' thing.
Undulating waves are generated by wind. 起伏的波浪由风产生。
Earth movements or tremors generate waves. 地壳运动或震颤产生波浪。
wind, earth movements or tremors, and the gravitational pull of the moon and the sun.
Two main techniques have been used for training elephants, which we may call respectively the tough and the gentle.
Two main techniques have been used for training elephants, which we may call respectively the tough and the gentle.
for it produces a resentful animal who at a later stage may well turn man-killer.
The first essential in elephant training is to assign to the animal a single mahout who will be entirely responsible for the job.
The first essential in elephant training is to assign to the animal a single mahout who will be entirely responsible for the job.
One young calf especially enjoyed raising a turtle to the surface with his snout,
There are even stories of half-trained elephant calves who have refused to feed and pined to death
but they do underline the general principle that the relationship between elephant and mahout is the key to successful training.
It is best to keep to hot drinks, bottled or canned drinks of well-known brand names-international standard of water treatment are usually followed at bottling plants.
But animals of this age do not easily become subservient to man, and a very firm hand must be employed in the early stages.

grammar.explain: 动名词 breaking and remaking、starting afresh 作介词宾语；writing to please 不定式表目的；those I respect 省略关系代词。易错点：in the breaking and remaking 中 and 连接两个动名词。
examples: In the breaking and remaking, in the timing interweaving, beginning afresh, the writer comes to discern things in his material. （在打破重组、时序交织、重新开篇中，作者渐悟素材中的内涵。）
This temptation to cover the distance between himself and the reader can be his undoing: he has begun to write to please. （欲拉近与读者距离的诱惑可能是祸根：他开始为取悦而写。）

grammar.explain: 修饰 writers、drafts、books：writers who read nothing but their own books、the drafts that follow、meanings that were not consciously in his mind。易错点：that follow 修饰 drafts；who 指人。
examples: The talent goes into the first draft, and the art into the drafts that follow. （才华倾注于初稿，艺术成就于后续修改。）
I have known very few writers, but those I have known and whom I respect, confess at once that they have little idea where they are going. （所识作家不多，但所敬者均承认初落笔时方向不明。）

tips: ①the drafts that follow = 后续修改稿；②write to please 为取悦而写；③动名词短语可作介词宾语（in breaking and remaking）。

title: Waves
scene: 波浪是海洋与大气斗争的产物，是无限持续的签名。阳光激发大气流动，风将太阳的信息传予大海，海浪再将古老而有力的信息传递下去。波浪有 crest、trough、height、wavelength 与 period 等基本特征。尽管海浪给人以水墙扑面而来的印象，水质点实则大致留在原位——若水体随浪整体推进，一切将灾难性地冲向海岸。深海中水质点作近似圆周运动；波浪从成熟到消亡，服从与其他「生命体」相同的法则。开阔海面波浪由风、地壳运动及日月引力产生，一旦生成，重力则驱使它们不断试图恢复海面的平坦。本课语法侧重 although 引导的让步从句，以及 leaving the water about where it was 等分词结构。

words.eg: A crest is the highest point of a wave. 波峰是波浪最高点。
The trough is the lowest point of the wave. 波谷是波浪最低点。
Wave length is the distance between two crests. 波长是两波峰间的水平距离。
A particle moves in a roughly circular orbit. 水质点作近似圆周运动。
Undulating waves are generated by wind. 起伏的波浪由风产生。
Earth movements or tremors generate waves. 地壳运动或震颤产生波浪。
The gravitational pull of the moon generates tides. 月球引力产生潮汐。
Everything would race shoreward with catastrophic results. 一切将灾难性地冲向海岸。
A wave is finally reabsorbed into the great ocean of life. 波浪终被重新吸纳入生命的大洋。
Down the precipice plunged the four climbers. 四名登山者坠下悬崖。
Sometimes a tame elephant is tethered nearby to give the wild one confidence,
A tame elephant is tethered nearby to give confidence. 一头驯象拴在附近以增信心。
a ticklish business which is achieved with the aid of two tame elephants roped to the captive on either side.
so that it can absorb the atmosphere of its new home and see that nothing particularly alarming is happening to its companions.
while others rub their hands over his skin to the accompaniment of a monotonous and soothing chant.
while others rub their hands over his skin to the accompaniment of a monotonous and soothing chant.
while others rub their hands over his skin to the accompaniment of a monotonous and soothing chant.
and its effects are reinforced by the use of endearing epithets,
and its effects are reinforced by the use of endearing epithets,
Endearing epithets reinforce pleasurable sensations. 亲昵称呼强化愉悦感。
The elephant is not immediately susceptible to such blandishments, however, and usually lashes fiercely with its trunk in all directions.
The elephant is not immediately susceptible to blandishments. 大象不会立刻被奉承打动。
The elephant is not immediately susceptible to such blandishments, however, and usually lashes fiercely with its trunk in all directions.
and the trunk eventually becomes so sore that the elephant curls it up and seldom afterwards uses it for offensive purposes.
Recording an earthquake

grammar.explain: although 引导让步从句，主句不可用 but：Although an ocean wave gives the impression of a wall of water, the water stays about where it was。易错点：although 与 but 不可同用；in actuality 引出现实情况。
examples: Although an ocean wave gives the impression of a wall of water moving in your direction, in actuality waves move through the water leaving the water about where it was. （尽管海浪给人以水墙扑面而来的印象，水质点实则大致留在原位。）
Although the basic features include a crest and a trough, ocean waves are among the earth's most complicated phenomena. （尽管有波峰波谷等基本特征，海浪仍是最复杂的现象之一。）

grammar.explain: 现在分词表伴随或结果：leaving the water about where it was、drawing the particle first towards the wave；不定式表目的：to restore the ocean surface。易错点：leaving 的逻辑主语是 waves。
examples: Waves move through the water leaving the water about where it was. （波浪穿过水体，水质点大致留在原位。）
Gravity is the force that drives them in a continual attempt to restore the ocean surface to a flat plain. （重力驱使波浪不断试图恢复海面平坦。）

tips: ①although 引导让步，主句不用 but；②leave the water about where it was 水质点留在原位；③period 指波峰通过一个波长所需时间。

title: Training elephants
scene: 驯象有「强硬」与「温和」两法：前者鞭打至服从，易养成愤恨之兽，日后或袭击人类；后者需更多耐心，却得性情开朗、多年忠诚服役之象。首要须指定单一 mahout 全权负责；象喜单一主人，甚至可生深厚情感。十五至二十岁捕获最经济，然此时野性难驯，须铁腕。野象先拴树旁，常伴驯象以增信心；进食正常后方始训练，辅以单调抚慰吟唱与亲昵称呼。本课语法侧重修饰 animal、elephants 的定语从句，以及 consisting of、setting an elephant to work 等非谓语结构。

words.eg: A single mahout is entirely responsible for the elephant. 一名象夫全权负责这头象。
Animals of this age do not easily become subservient to man. 这个年龄的动物不易顺从人类。
A tame elephant is tethered nearby to give confidence. 一头驯象拴在附近以增信心。
The elephant is not immediately susceptible to blandishments. 大象不会立刻被奉承打动。
Endearing epithets reinforce pleasurable sensations. 亲昵称呼强化愉悦感。
The tough method produces a resentful animal. 强硬法养成愤恨的野兽。
The captive plunges and screams when a man approaches. 野象见人便猛冲尖叫。
Getting the elephant to the training establishment is a ticklish business. 将象送至训练场是棘手之事。
The trunk seldom afterwards uses it for offensive purposes. 象鼻此后很少用于攻击。
Instruments that neither slumbered nor slept were invented. 须发明不眠不休的仪器。
One, for instance, consisted of rods of various lengths and thicknesses which would stand up on end like ninepins.
When a shock came, it shook the rigid table upon which these stood.
But instruments far more delicate than that were needed if any really serious advance was to be made.
Early seismometers kept the pen still while the paper moved. 早期地震仪固定笔尖、移动纸张。
But when table, penholder and paper are all moving, how is it possible to write legibly?
But when table, penholder and paper are all moving, how is it possible to write legibly?
It was upon this principle that the first instruments were made, but the paper was wrapped round a drum which rotated slowly.
While the drum was shaken, the line wriggled from side to side. 鼓震动时，线条左右扭动。
it would be more like that of a bluebottle buzzing round the room; it would be up and down, to and fro and from side to side.
Instruments have been devised and can be so placed that all three elements can be recorded in different graphs.
the graphic record shows three waves arriving one after the other at short intervals.
The first records the arrival of longitudinal vibrations.
The second marks the arrival of transverse vibrations which travel more slowly and arrive several minutes after the first.
Mars is too dry and poor in oxygen, Venus far too hot, and so is Mercury,
and the outer planets have temperatures near absolute zero and hydrogen-dominated atmospheres.
and found our then prevailing primitive state completely uninteresting to their own advanced knowledge.

grammar.explain: 修饰 animal、elephants、mahout：a resentful animal who may turn man-killer、elephants who have refused to feed、the relationship between elephant and mahout which is the key。易错点：指动物作主语可用 who/that。
examples: The former method produces a resentful animal who at a later stage may well turn man-killer. （前者养成愤恨的野兽，日后很可能袭击人类。）
Elephants like to have one master just as dogs do, and are capable of a considerable degree of personal affection. （象喜单一主人，且可生深厚情感。）

grammar.explain: consist of + doing、setting an elephant to work、beating him until...、rubbing their hands 等动名词/分词结构。易错点：method consisting of 中 consisting 修饰 method。
examples: The former method simply consists of setting an elephant to work and beating him until he does what is expected. （前者即让象干活并鞭打至其服从。）
Others rub their hands over his skin to the accompaniment of a monotonous and soothing chant. （旁人抚其皮肤，伴以单调抚慰吟唱。）

tips: ①who 可指动物；②consist of + doing；③turn man-killer 成为杀人象。

title: Recording an earthquake
scene: 地震悄然而至，须发明不眠不休的仪器。早期装置用长短不一的杆倾倒记录震级与方向；更精密的理想是笔尖在纸上记录地面运动。早期地震仪反其道而行：固定笔尖、移动纸张——如持笔不动、移纸书写。重物悬于绳端，手摇动时重物几乎不动，故地震中笔相对静止而纸动，墨迹记下震动。仪器可记录纵波、横波与表面波。本课语法侧重 if the shock were gentle 虚拟语气，以及 was recorded、were needed 等被动结构。

words.eg: Early seismometers kept the pen still while the paper moved. 早期地震仪固定笔尖、移动纸张。
Instruments record the vibrations generated by an earthquake. 仪器记录地震产生的震动。
The first wave records longitudinal vibrations. 首波记录纵向振动。
Transverse vibrations travel more slowly through the earth. 横波在地球内部传播较慢。
How is it possible to write legibly when everything is moving? 一切都在动时如何清晰书写？
The apparatus records only the horizontal component of the wave. 该装置仅记录波的水平分量。
Far more delicate instruments were needed for serious advance. 真正进展需要更精密仪器。
Instruments that neither slumbered nor slept were invented. 须发明不眠不休的仪器。
While the drum was shaken, the line wriggled from side to side. 鼓震动时，线条左右扭动。
What does the 'uniquely rational way' for us to communicate with other intelligent beings in space depend on?
What does the 'uniquely rational way' for us to communicate with other intelligent beings in space depend on?
This depends on the precise radio frequency of the 21-cm wavelength, or 1420 megacycles per second.
This depends on the precise radio frequency of the 21-cm wavelength, or 1420 megacycles per second.
The frequency is 1420 megacycles per second. 频率为每秒1420兆周。
It is the natural frequency of emission of the hydrogen atoms in space and was discovered by us in 1951;
it was not long before its use as the uniquely recognizable broadcasting frequency for interstellar communication was suggested.
searching for intelligences on other planets would be like trying to meet a friend in London without a pre-arranged rendezvous
and absurdly wandering the streets in the hope of a chance encounter.
but custom, we have a way of thinking, is behaviour at is most commonplace.
no matter how aberrant.
Yet that is a rather trivial aspect of the matter.

words.cn: 占优势的，起支配作用的
words.eg: The fact of first-rate importance is the predominant role that custom plays in experience and in belief,
and the very great varieties it may manifest.
No man ever looks at the world with pristine eyes.
He cannot go behind these stereotypes in his philosophical probings. 哲学探究中他无法超越这些刻板模式。

grammar.explain: if + were 表与事实可能相反的假设：If the shock were gentle, only the more unstable rods fell；Were the shock violent, every rod would topple。易错点：正式文体中 if 后用 were 不用 was。
examples: If it were gentle, only the more unstable rods fell. （若震动轻微，仅较不稳的杆倾倒。）
But instruments far more delicate than that were needed if any really serious advance was to be made. （若要真正进展，需远为精密的仪器。）

grammar.explain: 科普叙述常用被动：was recorded、were needed、is shaken、are devised。易错点：record for the scientist 中 record 作动词表「为……记录」。
examples: Thus the rods recorded for the slumbering scientist the strength of a shock. （杆为沉睡的科学家记录下震动强度。）
Its movement would be recorded in ink upon the surface of the paper. （其运动将以墨迹记录在纸面上。）

tips: ①if + were 虚拟；②seismometer 地震仪；③longitudinal/transverse 纵波/横波。

title: Are there strangers in space
scene: 给定一颗仅与地球相近的行星，生命几乎必然萌生；宇宙恒星数以万亿计，智慧生命应是自然组成部分。然为何尚无外星访客？或许他们早已来访，视当时人类为无趣原始。无线电波以光速传播，我们1920年代广播的信号尚在中途；化学火箭无法抵达数光年外的恒星。与外星智慧沟通有「唯一理性方式」：21厘米氢原子辐射频率1420兆周，宇宙任何射电天文学家都应知晓。本课语法侧重 Given a planet 条件结构，以及修饰 planets、stars 的定语从句。

words.eg: Other suns, as astronomers call them, are bound to have planets. 其他恒星，天文学家所称，必有行星。
The frequency is 1420 megacycles per second. 频率为每秒1420兆周。
It was suggested as a broadcasting frequency for interstellar communication. 它被建议为星际通讯广播频率。
Meeting a friend without a pre-arranged rendezvous is absurd. 无预定地点见朋友是荒唐的。
A superior civilization may have left an automatic messenger behind. 高等文明或留下自动信使。
They found our primitive state uninteresting. 他们视我们原始状态为无趣。
Astronomical distances are the most difficult obstacle to contact. 天文距离是联络最大障碍。
Hydrogen-dominated atmospheres cannot sustain life as we know it. 氢主导的大气无法维持我们所知的生命。
It is the natural frequency of emission of hydrogen atoms in space. 它是空间氢原子的自然辐射频率。
against those words of his own baby talk that are taken up into the vernacular of his family.
The life history of the individual is first and foremost an accommodation
There is no social problem it is more incumbent upon us to understand than this of the role of custom.
The study of custom can be profitable only after certain preliminary propositions have been accepted,
The study of custom can be profitable only after certain preliminary propositions have been accepted,
preferential weighting of one or another of the items in the series it selects for its consideration.
In all the less controversial fields, like the study of cacti or termites or the nature of nebulae,
In all the less controversial fields, like the study of cacti or termites or the nature of nebulae,
the necessary method of study is to group the relevant material and to take note of all possible variant forms and conditions.
ourselves and the barbarian, ourselves and the pagan, held sway over people's minds.
ourselves and the barbarian, ourselves and the pagan, held sway over people's minds.
It was necessary first to arrive at that degree of sophistication
It was necessary to recognize that these institutions which are based on the same premises, let us say the supernatural,
It was necessary to recognize that these institutions which are based on the same premises, let us say the supernatural,
I would make a very poor show of disputing the ownership of a cave with a bear, and in this I do not think that I stand alone.

grammar.explain: Given + 名词短语 = 给定/假设：Given a planet only approximately like our own, life is almost certain to start；if + 现在时表可能：If intelligent life exists...。易错点：Given 置于句首无需 if。
examples: Given a planet only approximately like our own, life is almost certain to start. （给定一颗仅与地球相近的行星，生命几乎必然萌生。）
Without something of this kind, searching for intelligences would be like wandering the streets in hope of a chance encounter. （若无此类约定，搜寻智慧生命犹如盲目游荡街头碰运气。）

grammar.explain: 修饰 planets、stars、rockets：planets like our own、stars that we know exist、rockets that have no chance。易错点：the only one on which life can survive 介词 + which。
examples: We are now pretty certain the Earth is the only one on which life can survive. （我们相当确定地球是唯一可维持生命的行星。）
Similarly, our own present primitive chemical rockets have no chance of transporting us to the nearest other star. （同理，我们现今的化学火箭无法将我们送至最近恒星。）

tips: ①Given = 给定/假设；②light year 光年；③21-cm wavelength 氢原子辐射频率。

title: Patterns of culture
scene: 习俗在经验与信仰中占主导，我们却常忽视其研究。无人以 pristine eyes 看世界；一切经传统习俗与制度过滤。正是从出生那一刻起，所承习俗塑造其经验与行为；至成年，文化之习惯即其习惯、文化之不可能即其不可能。约翰·杜威以母语词汇量对比儿语说明习俗影响之巨。人类学曾不可能，因人们将己与「野蛮人」对立；须将基于相同前提的制度一并研究，己文化亦在其中。本课语法侧重 It is from ... that 强调句，以及 the fact that 同位语从句。

words.eg: Custom plays a predominant role in experience. 习俗在经验中占主导。
No man ever looks at the world with pristine eyes. 无人以未受影响的目光看世界。
He cannot go behind these stereotypes in his philosophical probings. 哲学探究中他无法超越这些刻板模式。
Baby talk is taken up into the vernacular of his family. 儿语被纳入家庭本地语。
Social orders that developed autonomously show the point clearly. 自主发展的社会秩序清楚说明此点。
Life history is first and foremost an accommodation to community patterns. 生命史首先是对社群模式的适应。
Anthropology was by definition impossible under old distinctions. 在旧有区分下人类学按定义不可能。
Institutions based on the supernatural must be considered together. 基于超自然前提的制度须一并考量。
The predominant role of custom is of first-rate importance. 习俗的主导作用至关重要。
The last creature to compete with man was the mosquito.
But even the mosquito has been subdued by attention to drainage and by chemical sprays.
But even the mosquito has been subdued by attention to drainage and by chemical sprays.
Competition is not the simple process envisioned in biology. 竞争非生物学所设想的简单过程。
Morocco and California are bits of the Earth in very similar latitudes,
Morocco and California are in very similar latitudes. 摩洛哥与加州纬度非常相近。
The Holy Office caused heretics to be burned. 宗教裁判所曾焚烧异端者。
you are conditioned by the conventions of the community to such a degree that it is very difficult to conceive of anything really destructive.
Perhaps it will suffice to mention the nuclear bomb.
Perhaps it will suffice to mention the nuclear bomb.
to be more accurate we can think only a very little way outside and then only if we are very original.
A gifted American psychologist has said, 'Worry is a spasm of the emotion;
A gifted American psychologist has said, 'Worry is a spasm of the emotion;
A gifted American psychologist has said, 'Worry is a spasm of the emotion;
The stronger the will, the more futile the task.
One can only gently insinuate something else into its convulsive grasp.

grammar.explain: It is/was + 被强调部分 + that/who：It is from the moment of his birth that the customs shape his experience；It is the predominant role that custom plays...。易错点：强调时间、地点用 that，不用 when/where（正式语法）。
examples: From the moment of his birth, the customs into which he is born shape his experience and behaviour. （从出生那一刻起，所承习俗塑造其经验与行为。）
The fact of first-rate importance is the predominant role that custom plays in experience and in belief. （至关重要的事实是习俗在经验与信仰中的主导作用。）

grammar.explain: the fact that、the belief that 等后接 that 从句解释名词内容，that 不作成分不可省。易错点：同位语从句 that 与定语从句 that（作成分）区分。
examples: We are so familiar with the fact that man ages, that people have assumed the process was self-evident. （我们如此熟悉人会衰老这一事实，以致以为该过程不言而喻。）
There is no social problem it is more incumbent upon us to understand than this of the role of custom. （再没有比理解习俗作用更应承担的社会问题。）

tips: ①It is ... that 强调句；②the fact that 同位语从句；③pristine eyes 未受影响的目光。

title: Of men and galaxies
scene: 与其他物种的竞争已结束，人与人、社群与社群的竞争却依然激烈。决定我们演化的环境已非本质上的物理环境，而主要为我们所信之物。摩洛哥与加利福尼亚纬度气候相似，发展却截然不同，因居民心中观念不同。观念比武器更具破坏性；二三十页信息足以颠覆当今世界。在星系时间尺度上人类历史微不足道，然短暂岁月中的观念可倾覆文明。我们无法跳出文化植入脑海的思维模式。本课语法侧重 would be capable of 虚拟结果，以及修饰 environment、ideas 的定语从句。

words.eg: There are three thousand million galaxies in the universe. 宇宙中有三十亿个星系。
The Holy Office caused heretics to be burned. 宗教裁判所曾焚烧异端者。
It would be possible to inject ideas that would utterly destroy us. 或可注入足以毁灭我们的观念。
Perhaps it will suffice to mention the nuclear bomb. 或许提及核弹便已足够。
Morocco and California are in very similar latitudes. 摩洛哥与加州纬度非常相近。
Our environment is chiefly conditioned by the things we believe. 环境主要为我们所信之物所塑造。
Competition is not the simple process envisioned in biology. 竞争非生物学所设想的简单过程。
The most destructive effects have come from ideas, not weapons. 最具破坏性的影响来自观念，非武器。
It is very difficult to conceive of anything really destructive from within. 从内部很难构想真正具破坏性的东西。
One can only gently insinuate something else into its convulsive grasp.
And if this something else is rightly chosen, if it is really attended by the illumination of another field of interest,
gradually, and often quite swiftly, the old undue grip relaxes and the process of recuperation and repair begins.
gradually, and often quite swiftly, the old undue grip relaxes and the process of recuperation and repair begins.
gradually, and often quite swiftly, the old undue grip relaxes and the process of recuperation and repair begins.
But this is not a business that can be undertaken in a day or swiftly improvised by a mere command of the will.
they must be sedulously tended, if the vivifying fruits are to be at hand when needed.
they must be sedulously tended, if the vivifying fruits are to be at hand when needed.
Such an attempt only aggravates the strain of mental effort. 此举只会加重精神负担。
to work or worry about trifling things at the weekend.
who can gratify every caprice and lay their hands on almost every object of desire--for them a new pleasure a new excitement is only an additional satiation.
who can gratify every caprice and lay their hands on almost every object of desire--for them a new pleasure a new excitement is only an additional satiation.
who can gratify every caprice and lay their hands on almost every object of desire--for them a new pleasure a new excitement is only an additional satiation.
In vain they rush frantically round from place to place, trying to escape from avenging boredom by mere clatter and motion.
In vain they rush frantically round from place to place, trying to escape from avenging boredom by mere clatter and motion.
In vain they rush frantically round from place to place, trying to escape from avenging boredom by mere clatter and motion.
In vain they rush frantically round from place to place, trying to escape from avenging boredom by mere clatter and motion.

grammar.explain: would be capable of / would have been sufficient / could turn 表假设或推测结果：twenty pages would be capable of turning the world upside down；I would make a very poor show without modern weapons。易错点：与事实相反或推测用 would/could。
examples: Twenty or thirty pages of ideas and information would be capable of turning the present-day world upside down. （二三十页观念足以颠覆当今世界。）
I am sure that, without modern weapons, I would make a very poor show of disputing the ownership of a cave with a bear. （若无现代武器，我与熊争洞穴必大败。）

grammar.explain: 修饰 environment、ideas、community：the environment that determines our evolution、ideas that would utterly destroy us、the conventions of the community that condition you。易错点：chiefly conditioned by the things (that) we believe。
examples: Our environment is chiefly conditioned by the things we believe. （环境主要为我们所信之物所塑造。）
It is only someone looking on from outside that can inject the dangerous thoughts. （只有局外人能注入危险思想。）

tips: ①would be capable of 表可能结果；②condition 作动词=塑造/影响；③ideas are dangerous 观念危险。

title: Hobbies
scene: 忧虑是情绪痉挛，心灵抓住某物不放；只能温和引入另一兴趣领域，旧握力渐松，恢复始。培养爱好对公众人物至关重要，却不可一日速成。须有两三种真正爱好；晚年方说「我要产生兴趣」毫无用处——须喜欢所做之事，而非只做喜欢之事。丘吉尔所谓「命运宠儿」属工作即乐趣之人；然其最需间歇将工作逐出脑海。人分劳死、愁死、闷死三类。本课语法侧重 it is no use + doing，以及 aggravate/irritate、preferable/preferred 等词汇辨析。

words.eg: Worry is a spasm of the emotion. 忧虑是情绪痉挛。
One can only gently insinuate something else into its grasp. 只能温和引入他物。
The process of recuperation and repair begins. 恢复与修复过程开始。
The seeds must be sedulously tended. 种子须悉心培育。
Such an attempt only aggravates the strain of mental effort. 此举只会加重精神负担。
They can gratify every caprice. 他们可满足一切突发奇想。
A new excitement is only an additional satiation. 新刺激只是再添厌腻。
Ordinary holidays are grudged as enforced interruptions. 寻常假期被视作被迫中断而不情愿享受。
Sedulous tending yields vivifying fruits when needed. 悉心培育方能在需要时结出活力之果。
not only the means of sustenance, but a keen appetite for pleasure even in its simplest and most modest forms.
not only the means of sustenance, but a keen appetite for pleasure even in its simplest and most modest forms.
Each day is a holiday, and ordinary holidays, when they come, are grudged as enforced interruptions in an absorbing vocation.
Indeed, it may well be that those whose work is their pleasure are those who most need the means of banishing it at intervals from their minds.
But, contrary to a popular assumption, it is far from being the only one, or even the greatest.
He manoeuvres into his twenty pounds' worth of space. 他将车驶入二十英镑租位的空间。
The man who manoeuvres carelessly into his 20 pounds' worth of space at one of Europe's myriad permanent sites may find himself bumping a Bentley.
That the equipment of modern camping becomes yearly more sophisticated is an entertaining paradox for the cynic,
That the equipment of modern camping becomes yearly more sophisticated is an entertaining paradox for the cynic,
It also provides--and some student sociologist might care to base his thesis upon the phenomenon--an escape of another kind.
not because he cannot afford, or shuns their material comforts, but because he is afraid of them.
Affluent he may be, but he is by no means sure what to tip the doorman or the chambermaid.
Affluent he may be, but he is by no means sure what to tip the doorman or the chambermaid.
Master in his own house he has little idea of when to say boo to a manager hotel.

grammar.explain: it is no use + doing：It is no use starting late in life to say...；动名词作主语：cultivating a hobby is a policy；分词作定语：those toiled to death。易错点：no use 后接 doing 不接 to do。
examples: It is no use starting late in life to say: "I will take an interest in this or that." （晚年方说要产生兴趣毫无用处。）
The cultivation of a hobby and new forms of interest is therefore a policy of the first importance. （培养爱好因此是首要方针。）

grammar.explain: aggravate 加重（负担、病情），irritate 激怒；preferable to 优于（adj），preferred 被偏爱的；no use doing vs useless to do。易错点：aggravate 非「激怒」首选。
examples: It is no use doing what you like; you have got to like what you do. （做你喜欢的事无用；须喜欢你所做之事。）
Active hobbies are preferable to passive amusement for relieving strain. （积极爱好优于被动娱乐以缓解压力。）

tips: ①it is no use + doing；②aggravate 加重，irritate 激怒；③Fortune's favoured children 命运宠儿。

title: The great escape
scene: 经济是露营动机之一，却远非唯一或最大。现代露营装备日益精良，为誓要「远离尘世」的旅人带来更亮承诺。露营还提供另一种逃离：富裕旅人未必付不起酒店，却怕门童小费与经理阶层——露营将其解放。汽车崇拜源于独立感，露营将之精炼：从自家门前至山海再返回，一切尽在掌握；海滩过挤或天气恶劣，帐篷外即是退路。大陆营地高度国际化，德、英、法、荷语告示并列。本课语法侧重 Granted 让步，以及修饰 traveller、sites 的定语从句。

words.eg: He manoeuvres into his twenty pounds' worth of space. 他将车驶入二十英镑租位的空间。
Camping sites are highly cosmopolitan. 露营地高度国际化。
A snobbery of camping based on equipment already exists. 基于装备的露营势利已存在。
Police are wary of itinerants who cannot be traced. 警察警惕无法追踪的流动露营者。
A preponderance of Germans is common to Mediterranean sites. 地中海营地常见德国人占多数。
Escape if the local weather proves too inclement. 天气恶劣时即可撤离。
Insularity and self-containment go hand in hand, it is argued. 据称狭隘与自闭相伴。
Campers may wholly alienate landowners. 露营者或完全疏远地主。
Sophisticated equipment is an entertaining paradox for the cynic. 精良装备对愤世者而言是有趣悖论。
There is no superior 'they' in the shape of managements and hotel hierarchies to darken his holiday days.
The contemporary phenomenon of car worship is to be explained not least by the sense of independence and freedom that ownership entails.

words.cn: 由旅行社安排一切的一揽子旅游
words.eg: Idealists have objected to the practice of camping, as to the package tour,
Holiday hotels tend to cater for one nationality of visitors especially, sometimes exclusively.

words.cn: 以压倒优势地，清一色地
words.eg: but as yet there is no overwhelmingly specialized patronage.
but as yet there is no overwhelmingly specialized patronage.
At meal times the odour of sauerkraut vies with that of garlic.
At meal times the odour of sauerkraut vies with that of garlic.
Municipalities naturally want to secure the campers' site fees and other custom.
But most probably it will all depend upon campers themselves: how many heath fires they cause; how much litter they leave;

grammar.explain: Granted 引导让步，承认事实后转折：Granted, a snobbery exists; but he can deal with it。Contrary to 亦表让步对比。易错点：Granted 后可用逗号或分号接主句。
examples: Granted, a snobbery of camping itself, based upon equipment and techniques, already exists; but it is of a kind that he can readily understand. （诚然，基于装备的露营势利已存在；但旅人能够应对。）
But, contrary to a popular assumption, it is far from being the only motive, or even the greatest. （然而与普遍看法相反，经济远非唯一甚至最大动机。）

grammar.explain: 修饰 traveller、equipment、sites：the man who manoeuvres into his space、equipment that becomes yearly more sophisticated、sites that are highly cosmopolitan。易错点：the Splendide and the Bellavista 为酒店名。
examples: The modern traveller is often a man who dislikes the Splendide and the Bellavista, not because he cannot afford them. （现代旅人常厌恶豪华酒店，并非因付不起。）
Holiday hotels tend to cater for one nationality of visitors especially; camping sites, by contrast, are highly cosmopolitan. （度假酒店常专伺一国游客；露营地则高度国际化。）

tips: ①Granted = 诚然；②cosmopolitan 国际化；③manoeuvre 操纵驶入车位。

title: Planning a share portfolio
scene: 「一夜暴富」的贴士者比比皆是，严肃私人投资者却须规划良好的 portfolio——结构明确、目标清晰。问五家经纪商或得五种答案，因无唯一正确配置；将全部资金投入单一高风险股 Periwigs 等属明确错误。年长投资者优先保值与获取收益，宜配国债、存款及稳健股；年轻且心态乐观者可承受更高风险、配置成长股。黄金法则：分散风险，勿将全部资金投入单一标的。把拉斯维加斯心态留给挥霍者。本课语法侧重 if you are older 真实条件句，以及修饰 portfolio、investments 的定语从句。

words.eg: A serious investor needs a proper portfolio with a clear aim. 严肃投资者需目标明确的投资组合。
There is no shortage of tipsters offering get-rich-quick schemes. 一夜暴富贴士者比比皆是。
Older investors may hold gilts alongside conservative shares. 年长投资者可持国债与稳健股。
A portfolio may include convertibles or income shares. 组合可含可转换债或收益股。
Only if you are blessed with a sanguine disposition should you take an aggressive approach. 唯有乐观心态方可采取激进策略。
Include growth stocks alongside more pedestrian investments. 在平庸投资旁配置成长股。
The golden rule is to spread your risk and diversify. 黄金法则是分散风险。
Leave the Las Vegas mentality to those with money to fritter. 把赌博心态留给挥霍者。
Younger investors may accept more volatile growth stocks. 年轻投资者或可接受更波动的成长股。
Only good scouting is likely to preserve the freedoms so dear to the heart of the eternal Boy Scout.
Well, if you go to five reputable stock brokers and ask them what you should do with your money,
Well, if you go to five reputable stock brokers and ask them what you should do with your money,
--  even if you give all the relevant information about your age, family, finances and what you want from your investments.
We'll assume that you have sorted out the basics--like mortgages, pensions, insurance and access to sufficient cash reserves.
For instance, if you are older you have less time to recover from any major losses, and you may well wish to boost your pension income.
So preserving your capital and generating extra income are your main priorities.
you might include a couple of heady growth stocks in your portfolio, alongside your more pedestrian investments.
you might include a couple of heady growth stocks in your portfolio, alongside your more pedestrian investments.

grammar.explain: if + 现在时表将来真实条件：If you are older, preserving capital... are your main priorities；If you are younger, you may decide...。易错点：条件句用一般现在时表将来。
examples: If you are older you have less time to recover from any major losses, and you may well wish to boost your pension income. （若年事已高，挽回重大损失的时间较少，或愿增加养老金收入。）
If you recognize yourself in this description, you might include a couple of heady growth stocks in your portfolio. （若自认如此，可在组合中加入几只激进成长股。）

grammar.explain: 修饰 portfolio、investments、advisers：a portfolio with a definite structure、investments that behave differently、five advisers who would not have suggested...。易错点：a well-planned selection of investments, with a definite structure。
examples: The serious investor needs a proper portfolio — a well-planned selection of investments, with a definite structure and a clear aim. （严肃投资者需结构明确、目标清晰的投资组合。）
The golden rule here is spread your risk — if you put all of your money into Periwigs International, you are setting yourself up as a hostage to fortune. （黄金法则：分散风险——全押单一标的即听天由命。）

tips: ①if + 现在时表将来；②spread your risk 分散风险；③gilt 国债，volatile 波动的。
